content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for SaaS founders.
content.answer_block: To solve the 'no portfolio' trap, use Claude Code to rapidly scaffold and deploy high-utility micro-SaaS tools. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight, you transform complex development into a repeatable, high-speed process. This allows you to build three production-ready projects in a weekend, effectively proving your technical capability to potential clients.
content.intro:
The silence of an empty GitHub profile is deafening when you are staring down a potential high-ticket client. You have the vision, the business logic, and the drive, but the lack of a tangible track record acts as a friction point that kills conversions before the first discovery call even begins. You aren't just missing code; you are missing the signal of competence that separates founders from dreamers.

But the era of spending months on a portfolio is dead. Using Claude Code and Antigravity, we are shifting the paradigm from 'coding' to 'engineering systems.' This workflow allows you to architect complex, revenue-generating tools in hours, not weeks. It is time to stop apologizing for your lack of history and start building the evidence of your future success.

steps.title: Define High-Utility Micro-SaaS Scope
steps.description: Don't build 'To-Do' apps. Build niche tools that solve specific pain points for your target market to prove immediate business value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze market trends for micro-SaaS. Propose 3 high-demand, low-complexity project ideas that act as strong portfolio pieces for a technical founder.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Propose a directory structure for a Next.js + Supabase micro-SaaS MVP.'

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define the system architecture, ensuring your code follows enterprise-grade patterns despite the rapid build speed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust project architecture for a SaaS app using Next.js 14, Tailwind, and Drizzle ORM. Include security best practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'mkdir project && cd project && npm create next-app@latest .'

steps.title: Rapid Feature Implementation
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code's ability to ingest entire codebases to write complex features that demonstrate technical depth.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a detailed implementation plan for an AI-powered data processing feature. Include error handling and API rate limiting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Implement the authentication middleware based on the provided architecture file.'

steps.title: Automated Testing & Quality Assurance
steps.description: A portfolio project is useless if it's buggy. Use Claude Code to write comprehensive unit and integration tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test suite for the core business logic ensuring 90% coverage. Focus on edge cases in the payment integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Run vitest and fix any failing tests in the auth module.'

steps.title: Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Finalize your project with professional documentation, which is often more important than the code itself for demonstrating seniority.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional README.md that explains the business problem solved, the tech stack, and the architectural decisions made.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a professional deployment script for Vercel and commit the changes.'

pro_tips: Always commit your architectural design documents alongside your code to show prospective employers your thought process.
Use Claude Code to generate 'ADRs' (Architecture Decision Records) for every major feature to signal senior-level engineering maturity.
Focus on building 'connectors' or 'integrations' (e.g., Stripe to Notion), as these demonstrate real-world SaaS complexity better than standalone apps.
Leverage the 'Context' feature in Claude Code to keep your documentation and code in perfect sync during rapid iterations.
Never ship a portfolio piece without a live demo link; use Vercel or Railway for one-click deployment.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, update your LinkedIn bio to reflect your new 'AI-Native SaaS Architect' title and link your portfolio site directly to your GitHub repository.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build a portfolio that commands respect and high-ticket pricing. The market doesn't care about your resume; it cares about the problems you can solve. Stop waiting for permission to be an expert. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
